subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Ḥusayn! On this day the rustling of the Divine Lote-Tree hath been raised aloft, and at every moment a word is heard therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الحسین امروز حفیف سدره منتهی مرتفع و در هر حین کلمه از آن اصغا شده و
subcodes.subjects: @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
